title: High stakes battle in Kanti as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Kanti. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Kanti
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Kanti constituency.
